name: io.github.bch1212/modelwatch
description: Continuous behavioral drift monitoring for LLM apps — catches silent provider model updates.

environmentVariables.name: MODELWATCH_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from https://modelwatch.app (free tier: 5 specs, 500 runs/mo).

environmentVariables.name: MODELWATCH_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL for self-hosted deployments.
